## What you'd like
<!-- A clear description of the feature or improvement. -->

## Why this matters
<!-- The user-visible problem it solves, or the workflow it enables. -->

## Suggested approach (optional)
<!-- If you have a rough idea of how this could be implemented. -->

## Alternatives considered (optional)
<!-- Other ways the same goal could be achieved. -->

## Related docs / issues
<!-- Links to related docs in docs/, related GitHub issues, prior art. -->
